Kraken K9000 Espresso Machine

Overview

The Kraken K9000 is a semi-automatic espresso machine designed for home baristas who demand cafe-quality shots. Its dual-boiler system ensures stable brew temperature and simultaneous steaming.

Technical Specifications

ParameterValue
Brew temperature93 °C (±1 °C)
Pump pressure9 bar
Water tank capacity2.5 L
Boiler typeDual stainless-steel
Warm-up time3 minutes
Weight8.2 kg

Getting Started

Fill the water tank, power on, and wait for the ready indicator to illuminate. Insert a portafilter with freshly ground coffee (18 g dose recommended) and lock into the group head. Press the brew button for a 25-30 second extraction.
